query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_drills, COUNT(CASE WHEN goal IS NOT NULL AND goal != '' THEN 1 END) as with_goals, COUNT(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(description) > 0 THEN 1 END) as with_descriptions FROM drillDetails;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3knp7kHgPS8ePkR.root --database 4gdCHRuKFjrDK3bmH43Eh2 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_drills, COUNT(CASE WHEN goal IS NOT NULL AND goal != '' THEN 1 END) as with_goals, COUNT(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(description) > 0 THEN 1 END) as with_descriptions FROM drillDetails;
